name: ICAO Machine Readable Zone
description: Compliance profile for ICAO Doc 9303 Machine Readable Travel Document (MRTD) verification. Governs extraction and cryptographic validation of Machine Readable Zone (MRZ) data from TD1 (ID card), TD2 (visa-size), and TD3 (booklet/passport) documents. Used on the VERIFIER side to validate physical travel documents against digitally bound credentials.
specification_reference: ICAO Doc 9303 Parts 1–13 — Machine Readable Travel Documents

required_claims.name: issuing_country
required_claims.description: 3-letter ICAO issuing state or organization code

required_claims.name: birth_date
required_claims.description: Date of birth in YYMMDD format

required_claims.name: expiry_date
required_claims.description: Document expiry date in YYMMDD format

required_claims.name: check_digits_valid
required_claims.description: All MRZ check digits computed and validated

conformance_tests.spec_ref: ICAO Doc 9303 Part 3 §4 — MRZ composition rules

api_surface.standard_ref: ICAO Doc 9303 Part 3 §4 — Machine Readable Zone composition
ICAO Doc 9303 Part 3 §4.3 — Check digit algorithm
